meta.title: Beauty Therapist – Marianna Hancz | Budapest
meta.description: Premium cosmetic treatments in Budapest. Marianna Hancz, QMS Anti-aging specialist. Meso Laser, QMS Medicosmetics, Image Peeling. Book your appointment!

hero.title:
Natural Beauty Through
the Power of Science
hero.subtitle: Marianna Hancz offers personalised, science-based treatments to help your skin look fresh, radiant and harmonious.

about.title: Where Expertise Meets Care
about.body: I am Marianna Hancz, beauty therapist and QMS Anti-aging specialist based in Budapest. I believe that true beauty is not merely a surface layer — it is a balance created through expertise and attention. I tailor every treatment individually, because every skin is different.

services.title: What I Do For Your Skin
services.subtitle: Every treatment has one goal: to make you glow.

items.title: Meso I Laser Treatments
items.description: Revolutionary laser and focused mesotherapy delivering active ingredients 5–8 mm deep. Anti-wrinkle, firming, revitalising — needle-free.

items.title: QMS Medicosmetics
items.description: One of the world's most prestigious premium cosmetic systems. Pure oxygen firming and Neo Tissudermie facial rejuvenation with guaranteed results.

items.title: Image Designer Peels
items.description: Professional peeling treatments for radiant skin, even tone and texture. A youthful, fresh overall effect every time.

items.quote: Marianna is always kind and maximally helpful, a professional with outstanding expertise. Time spent with her is always refreshing.
items.author: Regular Guest

items.quote: Not only my skin, but my soul rests here. She gives that little extra that makes the whole experience different.
items.author: Returning Guest

items.q: How do I book an appointment?
items.a: By phone at +36 20 339 3399 or by email at info@szepsegterapeuta.hu.

items.q: First visit — what should I expect?
items.a: We start with a skin analysis to understand exactly what your skin needs. Just bring yourself.

items.q: Who is Meso Laser recommended for?
items.a: Anyone seeking anti-wrinkle, firming or revitalising results, needle-free and science-based.

contact.title: Book Your Appointment Today
contact.subtitle: I would love to welcome you! Call, email, or send a message using the form below.

footer.tagline: Beauty inside and out — it's all about you.
